2221800.name: Spell Slinger
2221800.description:
Spell Slinger: A Magical First-Person Open-World Adventure!

Enter Arkanix – a vast, living world of mystery, magic, and danger. In this first-person action adventure, you’ll master powerful spells, uncover secrets, and face perilous challenges across a handcrafted fantasy realm.

Master the Art of Magic and Survival!

In Singleplayer Extraction Missions, every journey begins at a random point on the map. Search for loot, solve puzzles, and banish enemies from the Grimshade Brotherhood. Reach the portal to claim your rewards – or lose everything if you fall before extraction.

Between missions, explore your Hub Temple, craft items, and unlock unique spells and artifacts to expand your powers.

Explore Together in 4-Player Coop

Team up with friends to freely explore the world, complete 30 handcrafted quests, and face the challenges of Arkanix together. Combine your spells, ride enchanted brooms, and uncover the secrets hidden in ancient ruins.

Challenge Others in PvP Battles

Put your spellcasting to the test in fast-paced PvP combat for up to 16 players. Prove your mastery of magic in thrilling duels and chaotic arena fights — where every spell counts.

Shape the Future of Arkanix

Your actions leave a mark on the realm. Discover hidden areas, unlock secret paths, and watch your magic reshape the world. Community choices and player discoveries can change Arkanix — sometimes forever.
2221800.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 瑞典语, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
